title: GUIDE FOR MECHANICAL TOY VIDEOS

preserved_instructions_excerpt:
GROW WITH RASINDU
MECHANICAL TOY VIDEOS
–  GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
Step 1 — Setup
Copy the Master Prompt below and paste it into Claude as a new conversation. The generator will start automatically and show you 20 categories to pick from.
Step 2 — Pick a Category
Type a number from 1 to 20, type your own custom subject, or say "more" to get fresh categories. The generator will give you 6 models with 3 prompts each.
Step 3 — Generate Image 1 (Compact Device)
Copy IMAGE PROMPT 1 from any model you like. Go to OpenArt, select Nano Banana 2, paste the prompt, and generate. This is your capsule image — the closed mechanical pod before transformation.
Step 4 — Generate Image 2 (Fully Transformed)
Take the image you generated in Step 3 and add it as a reference image. Then copy IMAGE PROMPT 2 from the same model, paste it as the prompt, and generate. This is your final transformed mechanical toy.
Step 5 — Generate the Video
Now you have two images. Go to Kling 3.0 on OpenArt. Add Image 1 (capsule) as the Start Frame and Image 2 (transformed) as the End Frame. Copy the VIDEO PROMPT from the same model, paste it as the prompt, and generate. This creates the full transformation video from capsule to mechanical toy.
Step 6 — Repeat
Go back to Claude and pick another model or another category. Every time you pick the same category again, you get completely new models with fresh prompts.
Grow with Rasindu
